prompt:
Use case: identity-preserve
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite
Primary request: regenerate this grave ranger as a cleaner runtime battle sprite
Subject: the same grave ranger with dark ranger leathers, undead or death-touched styling, and a ranged hunter silhouette
Style/medium: moody fantasy tactics sprite illustration, painterly pixel-art-inspired, readable at small scale
Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, facing slightly left, feet planted, transparent background, tight sprite bounds
Lighting/mood: restrained grave-lit fantasy mood with controlled contrast
Color palette: dead violet, charcoal, bone gray, muted leather brown

Avoid: extra characters, extra props, glow spam, particles, photorealism, anime gloss, cinematic background
